history.finding: CI (.github/workflows/ci.yml) triggers ONLY on push:main and pull_request; never on sprint-branch push. `gh run list --branch sprint/S6INREPO` returned zero runs. There is structurally no branch-CI dashboard to probe for a pre-PR fork branch. The real external CI gate fires at the draft PR + code-review high (the next lifecycle phase).

The bypass is (a) human-vouched, (b) logged with the structural reason (no branch CI exists by repo design), and (c) does not skip verification — it relocates external CI to the draft PR where it actually runs.
